review_text: Expensive 65 on week days 85 weekends, very clean well kept gardens an bathrooms, new concrete slab .
Hey a roof over your head's always a good thing mate

We stayed 4 nights from Thursday to Monday. Thursday and Sunday nights were $65 each and Friday and Saturday were $85 each, so $300 for 4 nights. A lot more than we would normally pay however the amenities, the BBQ area and pool were all spotless. The on-site managers Sharon and Chris were welcoming and personally maintained the amenities to a very high standard. The park backs onto the Beechmont Hotel where we had lunch with friends on both Saturday and Sunday. It is a 1 hour walk or 5 minute drive to Hinze Dam. Whilst the park is mainly permanents they were very friendly and even invited us to Happy Hour. Very close to the Gold Coast if you want to stay somewhere less”touristy”

Had a wonderful stay at Advancetown Caravan Park. Managers are amazing,  friendly and helpful. Amenities and pool spotless. Gardens well looked after. So nice to feel welcome in a park.  Location peaceful but also a great pub a short stroll away.

85$ 1 nuit, il n'y a qu'un seul emplacement pour camping car ou caravane..le reste ce sont des résidents à l'année qui vivent dans des mobilhome.  Pas de bac pour faire la vaisselle. Piscine gelée.  Camping propre et sanitaires également.  Possède une camp kitchen mais le barbecue tres sale. À 17h derrière l'emplacement numéro 14, il y a un pub qui reçoit des groupes de musiciens et la musique résonne dans tout le camping jusqu'à 23h. Si vous voulez du calme , passez votre chemin

The Advancetown Caravan Park is very friendly and so helpful. The amenities are the cleanest we've come across, including the dump point. It is so quiet with no traffic noise, and such a pretty drive. With easy access to the Gold Coast, Robina, and other areas of interest,  Advancetown CP is a hidden gem.
This is a caravan park
Wow couldn't believe how good the place looks unbelievable the changes. Awesome
Lovely stay amongst the treetops. Very friendly owner, ensuring that we had the best holiday possible. Facilities and garden frequently maintained. Thankyou!!
lovely quiet and very clean and secure park has mostly permanet residents.
Sehr sauberer,  beschaulichen Campingplatz.  Sehr wenig Stellplätze.
Iook  like a permanent caravan Park

From the moment I drove my 21’ motor home in I could see this would be an enjoyable experience.. Elizabeth is the boss and walked me to my spot and guided me in ..
The ablutions block is impeccably clean and the showers are a pleasure to stand under with lovely free flowing instant hot water.
The grounds are very well maintained and you can tell that the care takers are not lazy!!
Elizabeth is friendly and co-operative and will help you if you need assistance ..
I will definately book there again .. I was only there for 3 x nites but felt relaxed and comfortable the entire time !!
Congratulations Elizabeth and team .. I will see you again .. Al Gordon (BLI BLI - Sunshine Coast)

Have stayed here 4 times now.  The most spotless amenities you will find anywhere. Need to book as only a few sites available for travellers.   Great location near Gold Coast without being subject to the theme parks, the traffic and children's entertainment.   An adult park.  Handy pub next door with huge outdoor area.

Lovely park, run by 2 great ladies. Very approachable and hard workers. The grounds are immaculate. |The facilities are top notch. |We have travelled all around Aust and this park is amongst the best.|We stayed 5 nights. Very restful spot.|Sue & Mick

We stayed for 5 days while visiting friends.  You have to book in advance as it is a small  CP but well worth the stay. It has been family owned for over 20 years, the grounds are manicured and landscaped  into pleasant gardens. The facilities are scrupulously clean. There is a big swimming pool and a BBQ area available.  There are several permanent residents there that make you feel most welcome so it is more like joining in with a community. Just walking our old dog round the park resulted in many people stopping and chatting.
The staff there are very friendly and always busy round the park, cleaning, gardening and doing maintenance.
The pictures  show a view of the park down one road, and a shot of my caravan as we were getting ready to hitch up an leave.
My wife and I have been caravanning for over 30 years in all states and territories of Australia and the Advancetown Caravan Park has to be one of the best we have seen. If there is a down side, then some big rigs would have difficulty in parking on some of the sites. My 6 metre van went on easily.
There is a pub a short walk away and the Nerang Shops a short drive away.
Great Caravan Park, good staff, welcoming community and marvellous facilities.

Wir haben hier eine Nacht mit dem Wohnmobil verbracht. Der Platz ist sehr ruhig und es waren nahezu keine Camper zu sehen. Die meisten Plätze waren wohl Dauerplätze mit festen Anbauten. Ich habe nur zwei Wohnmobilstellplätze wahrgenommen.

Die Frau die uns wartend empfangen hat war sehr nett, wollte aber offensichtlich nach Hause. Sie war jedenfalls sehr schnell weg und das Büro geschlossen. Für uns nicht weiter schlimm.

Der WLAN Empfang war auf unserem Stellplatz leider nicht möglich und so musste ich zur Schranke am Eingang gehen. Es schien auch nicht sehr Leistungsstark zu sein, denn ich musste sehr lange dort verweilen um meine Dinge zu erledigen.

Der Pool war sehr schön und sauber. Die Sanitäranlagen waren sauber aber etwas in die Jahre gekommen.

Für eine Übernachtung war es für uns in Ordnung. 2 Wochen hätte ich hier wohl nicht verbracht. Es scheint ein Ort für ruhige Dauercamper zu sein.

Stayed on an unpowered site in this wonderful caravan park. It’s small, unbelievably clean and the host is lovely. Never seen a caravan park so well maintained, even the trim of the grass is perfect. As for the amenities, we have never seen such clean amenities in any campsite, not even a bug in sight!!!

Great location, no horrible bugs flying around even in the heat, just a few bush turkeys here and there.

Couldn’t fault this place ✅

Beautiful little park that's clearly really well managed. Lovely staff, great pool and grassed area and massive toilet block that was the cleanest we've come across in our travels so far. Reasonably priced; $62pn for a powered site 2A2K

Very clean maintained park absolutely spotless with a few personal touches very impressed, owners are lovely
Thanks
Great little caravan park right next to the Beechmont Hotel. We are really enjoying our stay here 👍🏻
Merci de nous avoir accueilli tardivement et gentiment, dans ce camping très entretenu et agréable.

We booked for two nights on a power site, we booked the day we needed to be there and Liz was able to squeeze us in. We arrived late due to bad traffic and Liz had waited up for us. The caravan park itself it quite, small and very homely! The residents are all lovely people. The pool, bathrooms, laundry are all kept in great condition. 30 mins drive approx to surfers paradise, site situated over looking the Gold Coast in a mountain setting. Would stay here again in a heat beat. Thanks so much Liz!

What a place! Really kind staff and campers, probably the cleanest and quietest campground in the area.
Thank you so much!

Meticulously kept, bathrooms immaculate, gardens pool and facilities very clean and tidy. A smaller park with a lot of permanent residents, and a quiet bush setting so it was very peaceful and secure. Would stay again here in preference to being in busy Gold Coast. 6 kms to Nerang shopping centre and close to all Gold Coast Theme Parks.

The most spotless, well looked after park, we've been to so far. And by spotless, I mean not a cobweb or spec of dust to be seen in the amenities block or the small common area. Only small, but really quiet, admittedly we were there before school holidays kicked off. Mostly permanent residents here, who are welcoming and friendly, are happy to chat, but will also give you your space. Only 30-60 minutes to most attractions, including the coast and surrounding mountains. Lovely owners and very reasonably priced.
Had a wonderful time, very clean and manicured. Will definitely visit again.

Our 6th visit over 6 years. Really enjoy the friendly atmosphere, exceptional amenities and wonderful owners. You ladies do a wonderful job.
Here again June 5th 2023. A bit surprised that the rate has gone to $58 pn for pwr & water. Yes the facilities are 5🌟 and the staff/owners are also 5🌟. We travel from WA so the increase is small in the whole scheme of things 😎

A lovely, small spot to pull up for a couple of nights close to the Gold Coast hinterland and Gold Coast itself. All the people, including the grounds keeper and residents, have been really lovely. Totally clean (and quiet) bathrooms, very close to the Beechmont Hotel which has live music. Good vibes all around.
